arts.ttl: Xavi's stance on his next job after Man Utd's two approaches for ex-Barcelona manager

arts.ttl: FC Barcelona vs Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, will Kompany bench Thomas Müller for Jamal Musiala, injury updates, and more!
arts.sum: On the Bayern Munich side of things, Jamal Musiala participated in the final team training session before the game, which makes him a potential candidate for the starting lineup. For Bayern Munich and Vincent Kompany, this game is a proving ground, a chance to show that the team can actually beat high quality opposition.

arts.ttl: Sevilla star set for three-month absence after serious hamstring injury sustained against Barcelona
arts.sum: After two wins in three, Sevilla were brought back down to earth on Sunday as they were comprehensively beaten by Barcelona at the Estadi Olimpic. To make matters worse, they also lost Chidera Ejuke in the first half, as he pulled up with a hamstring injury. arts.ttl: Chelsea would consider selling Barcelona target in 2025
arts.sum: In recent months, Barcelona have been linked with a move for Chelsea youngster Carney Chukwuemeka. The 21-year-old midfielder is highly-rated at Stamford Bridge, but despite this, he has only seen 14 minutes of action since the start of the season.
